obsolete_functionality.reason: Inconsistent comment style in newly added block: the first two rules (tests/generated/, docs/codex/) lack the '# harness-propagated by session-gitignore-propagate.sh' attribution comment that the subsequent two rules (.claude/dev-registry/dev-*/, .playwright-mcp/) have. The section header '# Harness-generated output' covers the first group, but the split formatting suggests a partial manual edit was merged with script-propagated output, creating a misleading comment structure.
obsolete_functionality.recommendation: Either add '# harness-propagated by session-gitignore-propagate.sh' before tests/generated/ and docs/codex/ to match the format of the other two rules, or remove the per-rule attribution comments and keep only the section header for consistency.

obsolete_functionality.reason: The *.png rule is present in the manually edited block but absent from HARNESS_RULES in session-gitignore-propagate.sh. This means *.png will not be auto-propagated to project repos, creating drift between the dot-claude .gitignore and what the hook propagates. The rule is either missing from HARNESS_RULES or should not be in the propagated section.
obsolete_functionality.recommendation: Either add '*.png' to HARNESS_RULES in session-gitignore-propagate.sh so it propagates consistently, or move the *.png rule out of the harness-propagated block and into a separate clearly-labelled section.

notes: session-gitignore-propagate.sh is a new untracked file; it is correctly registered in settings.json SessionStart hooks and has executable bit set.

All project .gitignore changes (budget-management, multi-asset-portfolio, travel-planner, knowledge-system-jade, feedbackforge, orchestra) add standard harness output rules consistent with HARNESS_RULES; no violations found.
settings.json change adds a single SessionStart hook entry for session-gitignore-propagate.sh; structurally correct.
/root/.claude.json is properly listed in /root/.gitignore and is not tracked in version control; no violation.
/root .gitignore correctly received 3 of 4 HARNESS_RULES via the hook (the 4th .playwright-mcp/ was already present); idempotent behavior confirmed.
